text:
- update to 1.0.2 (no code changes, only packaging improvements)

- add pypi mirror
- add LICENSE (GPLv2)
- move pkg-plist entry to PLIST_FILES
- mark it Python3 ready (builds fine with python32)
- remove author attribution from pkg-descr - it's deprecated
